zh.lifeSummary: 當Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica於大約1248年出生在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉時，他的父親Bolesław II Rogatka Piast25歲，母親Hedwig von Anhalt30歲。他和Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1296年2月22日在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉享年49歲，埋葬在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica于大约1248年出生在波兰萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉时，他的父亲Bolesław II Rogatka Piast25岁，母亲Hedwig von Anhalt30岁。他和Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast至少有3个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1296年2月22日在波兰萊瓦福斯吉享年49岁，埋葬在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: "the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Fat"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fatt
meanings: English: nickname for a fat person, from Middle English fat(te) ‘fat’ (Old English fætt).
Native American (Navajo): translation into English (compare 1 above) of the personal name Neesk'ahí ‘fat one’.

nameMeanings.name: Henryk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica was born about 1248, in Legnica, Wrocław, Poland, his father, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, was 25 and his mother, Hedwig von Anhalt, was 30. He had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast. He died on 22 February 1296, in Wrocław, Poland, at the age of 49, and was buried in Wrocław, Lower Silesia, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica est né environ 1248, à Legnicki, wrocławskie, Pologne, son père, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Anhalt, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast. Il est décédé le 22 février 1296, à wrocławskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica um 1248 in Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bolesław II Rogatka Piast 25 und seine Mutter Hedwig von Anhalt 30. Er hatte mit Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1296 im Alter von 49 Jahren in wrocławskie, Polen und wurde in Wrocław, Niederschlesien, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica è nato il circa 1248 nel Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Hedwig von Anhalt, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast. Morì il 22 febbraio 1296, nel wrocławskie, Polonia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnicaが約1248年にポーランドウロクlアウスキレグニクイで生まれた時，父Bolesław II Rogatka Piastは25歳，母Hedwig von Anhaltは30歳であった。彼はElizabeth of Kalsz Piastとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1296年2月22日にポーランドウロクlアウスキで49歳で死去し，ポーランドドルノsルaスキウロクlアウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica(이)가 대략 1248년 폴란드 록l아w스키 레그닉키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bolesław II Rogatka Piast(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig von Anhalt(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년 2월 22일 폴란드 록l아w스키에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 도노sa스키 록l아w에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polônia, seu pai, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Anhalt, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1296, em wrocławskie, Polônia, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica родился около 1248 г. в местности легникки, рокlавски, Польша, его отцу по имени Bolesław II Rogatka Piast было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Anhalt, 30. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast. Он умер 22 февраля 1296 г. в местности рокlавски, Польша в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности рокlав, долноsлaски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica nació aproximadamente 1248, en Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, su papá, Bolesław II Rogatka Piast, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Anhalt, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1296, en wrocławskie, Polonia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia.
